title: rosa elliptica subvar. thuringiaca
intro: Rosa elliptica subvar. thuringiaca, also known as the German rose or Rosa thuringiaca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Rosa elliptica subvar. thuringiaca include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it effective in treating headaches, fever, and rheumatism. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through infusions, teas, and topical applications, although its use is less common in modern medicine due to the availability of synthetic alternatives.
